refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, obstacles, and work-zone boundaries to generate a comprehensive worksite model/map.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; refining it clarifies the specific analysis tasks (terrain, obstacles, work-zone) that collectively fulfill the worksite mapping requirement.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by comparing generated worksite model/map against ground truth data and ensuring all required site features are represented accurately.
sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

candidate_dps: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection.
DP2: Employ GIS-based mapping algorithms for work-zone representation.
DP3: Integrate sensor data with real-time processing to update the worksite model dynamically.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Use LIDAR and camera sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection.

potential_sources: Sensor data processing tightly coupled with terrain and obstacle analysis.
Work-zone representation logically separated via GIS algorithms.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP focuses on sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection, which can be modularized separately from work-zone GIS mapping, minimizing coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and reliability of LIDAR and camera sensors.
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model quality.
High safety criticality requires robust error handling.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding a DP for GIS-based work-zone mapping to cover all sub-FRs explicitly.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for integrating sensor data, processing, and generating the worksite model.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives raw sensor data (LIDAR, camera) from Vehicle module.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends updated worksite model/map data to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules for planning and execution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Facilitates data exchange with Safety Services and remote Teleoperation.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary module for worksite mapping; high containment of DP logic with minimal diffusion.
Provides raw sensor data but does not contain mapping logic.
Consumes mapping data for remote control but no mapping logic.
Uses mapping data for safety alerts but does not implement mapping.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module should own the worksite mapping DP to centralize processing and minimize diffusion across modules.
containment_risks: Potential performance bottleneck if all sensor data processing centralized.
Risk of interface overload between NGHE Solution and Vehicle for telemetry data.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate splitting sensor data preprocessing into Vehicle module to reduce NGHE Solution load.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The refined FRs are well matched by the selected DP focusing on sensor fusion for terrain and obstacle detection.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk exists if sensor data preprocessing is not modularized properly.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment is strong within NGHE Solution; interfaces are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the NGHE Solution module outputs against known site data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution with interfaces to Vehicle and Teleoperation.

recommended_revisions: Add DP and IM considerations for GIS-based work-zone mapping to cover all sub-FRs.
Consider modularizing sensor data preprocessing to Vehicle module to reduce diffusion.

decision.justification: The current decomposition covers terrain and obstacle analysis well but lacks explicit DP and IM coverage for work-zone representation. Also, sensor data preprocessing may need clearer modularization.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area.
FR2: Detect and represent obstacles within the worksite.
FR3: Define and represent work-zone boundaries and areas.

revise.why: To explicitly include GIS-based work-zone mapping and consider sensor data preprocessing separation.

assumptions: LIDAR and camera sensors provide reliable data.
NGHE Solution can handle centralized processing load.
open_risks: Sensor data inaccuracies impacting model quality.
Potential performance bottlenecks in centralized processing.
evidence_needed: Performance benchmarks for NGHE Solution processing.
